root_text.an4.265:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.265:1.3: Attanā ca adinnādāyī hoti, parañca adinnādāne samādapeti, adinnādāne ca samanuñño hoti, adinnādānassa ca vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—
root_text.an4.265:2.1: Attanā ca adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, adinnādānā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti, adinnādānā veramaṇiyā ca vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe….

translation_text.an4.265:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.265:1.4: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there. …
